label: Exploration
description: Text contains only atmospheric description with no entities.

label: Exploration
description: Adventures explore ancient strongholds and ruined kingdoms in the Sword Coast region

label: Guardian Encounters
description: Mysterious guardians guard the magical hot spring

label: Mushroom Connection
description: Magical connection to the Elemental Plane of Fire affects myconids

label: Cursed Hold
description: Horrible curse discovered in the ship's hold

label: Blue Dragon Lair
description: Exploration of the blue dragon's lair containing a captive bronze wyrmling

label: Monster Appears On Deck
description: A monster hauls itself up onto the deck as lightning flashes.

label: Merrow Escape
description: The merrow escapes into the depths

label: Sailor Cheer
description: Sailors celebrate after the merrow departs

label: Learning About Dangers
description: Characters learn about the dangers facing Stormwreck Isle.

label: Encounter_with_Drowned_Sailors
description: Undead sailors emerge from the water and approach the party

label: Dialogue
description: A kobold initiates conversation by asking the travelers' name

label: Guardian Encounter
description: Tarak is repelled by the fungal octopus guardian protecting the myconid caves.

label: Tattoo Symbol Discovery
description: Detecting the Gilded Gallows symbol on Tarak's tattoo requires a successful History check.

label: Statue Identification
description: Character identifies the statue as depicting a bronze dragon using Arcana skill check

label: Runara's Revelation
description: Runara reveals the statue depicts Astalagan, her late father

label: Observation
description: Description of monastic cells layout and occupancy

label: Winch Operation
description: Mechanism allows lowering/pulling pallet via winch

label: Observation
description: Residents favor Tarak's cooking

label: Dialogue About Myconid Mission
description: Tarak informs the party about seeking help from the myconids and retrieving heart cap mushrooms.

label: Guardian Encounter
description: The party battles the fungal octopus guarding the sea caves.

label: Myconid Investigation
description: The party explores the sea caves to determine the cause of the myconids' distress.

label: Dream_Interpretation_Dialogue
description: Runara interprets the cleric's dream about the hunger of death and directs them to investigate the wreck of Compass Rose

label: Paladin's Arrival and Guidance
description: Runara advises the paladin to consult Tarak and Varnoth, and recommends spending time in the temple of Bahamut.

label: Final Reflection Prompt
description: Runara questions the paladin about lessons learned against corruption, suggesting personal quests to combat evil.

label: Revelation
description: Runara reveals her true draconic form through magical transformation

label: Dialogue
description: Runara explains the resurgence of conflict on the island and requests assistance

label: Discovery of Hot Springs
description: Adventurers uncover a hidden cove with a glowing hot spring surrounded by colorful fungi.

label: Discovery of Hot Spring Regeneration
description: Characters can regain hit points by bathing in the hot spring after spending 10 minutes.

label: Kobold Encounter
description: Eight kobolds and three winged kobolds appear as per the 3rd-level encounter guidelines.

label: Travel Options Revealed
description: Characters learn of two ways to reach Seagrow Caves: rowboat journey or coastal trek

label: Tide Access Restriction
description: Characters must navigate tides to access lower caverns

label: Telepathic Link Activation
description: Characters gain telepathic communication with myconids via rapport spores

label: Myconid Movement Triggered by Distress Spores
description: Myconids in areas B2 and B3 relocate to area B4 after detecting distress spores released by damaged myconids.

label: Confrontation
description: Conscious myconids attack intruders lacking escort

label: Shared Trance
description: Four myconids enter a dream-like meld state

label: Illness Effect
description: Myconids show signs of blight-induced fatigue

label: Defensive Encounter
description: Myconid Adults defend their unconscious leader against unauthorized intruders

label: Elixir Creation
description: Characters bring ruby morel to cloister, enabling Tarak to craft an elixir of health

label: Fume Drake Encounter
description: Two fume drakes ambush intruding creatures in the sulfer-laden cave

label: Blight Source Revelation
description: Characters uncover the link between the tomb's magical energies and the toxic fungal spread

label: Level Advancement
description: Characters gain a level upon completing the chapter, advancing based on prior explorations of key locations

label: Harpy Lair Discovery
description: Characters discover the harpy's nest in the crow's nest, filled with debris and remnants of its lair.

label: Treasure Discovery
description: Characters discover valuable loot in the crow's nest

label: Movement_Illusion
description: Crabs create illusions of movement over skeletal remains

label: Suspicious Movement
description: The skeletal remains appear to shift slightly, suggesting unnatural activity.

label: Structural Collapse
description: A fallen chest created holes connecting the captain's quarters to the lower deck hold

label: Travel Options
description: Multiple routes described to reach the Clifftop Observatory

label: Approach_by_Water
description: Characters approach the observatory by sea, choosing between rowing directly or anchoring near pillars to access elevated areas.

label: Screeching Roar Encounter
description: A winged, glittering blue shape roars and perches atop a distant column.

label: Stirge Attack
description: A stirge attack disrupts the kobolds' preparations for Sparkrender's ritual.

label: Effigy Explanation
description: Mek and Minn explain the purpose of the dragon effigies to the adventurers.

label: Creative Access to D4
description: Characters devise unconventional methods to reach the isolated study

label: Dragon Awakened
description: Sparkrender awakens and growslows threats in Draconic

label: Breathing Attack
description: Blue Dragon Wyrmling uses Breath Weapon ability

label: Flight Attempt
description: Sparkrender flees after dropping to 10 hp

label: Discovery
description: Growling heard from area D6

label: Statue Alignment Puzzle
description: Players align statues with the Dragon of Dawn constellation to activate the hidden staircase to the secret archive.

label: Staircase Activation
description: Once statues are properly aligned, a glowing spiral staircase appears connecting to the library below.

label: Seal Mechanism
description: Disrupting the statue alignment causes the staircase to rise, trapping anyone on it above.

label: Discovery
description: Characters find Sparkrender's hoard containing coins and valuable items

label: Unexpected Encounter
description: A large bronze dragon crashes through debris and begins to stir

label: Discovery of Magical Artifacts
description: Characters uncover a +1 battleaxe and a 2nd-level hold person spell scroll after succeeding on an Intelligence (Investigation) check

label: Freeing Aidron
description: Adventurers remove chains binding Aidron using clasps.
